Coolify Environment Variable Template

POSTGRES_USER=flowpilot
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME
POSTGRES_DB=flowpilot

DATABASE_URL=postgresql://flowpilot:CHANGE_ME@postgres:5432/flowpilot?schema=public

REDIS_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME
REDIS_URL=redis://:CHANGE_ME@redis:6379

NEXTAUTH_URL=https://app.yourdomain.com
NEXTAUTH_SECRET=CHANGE_ME

DEFAULT_ORGANIZATION_ID=

WEB_PORT=3000
N8N_PORT_HOST=5678

WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID=
WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN=
WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN=CHANGE_ME
WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET=

N8N_HOST=0.0.0.0
N8N_PORT=5678
N8N_PROTOCOL=https
N8N_SECURE_COOKIE=true

WEBHOOK_URL=https://n8n.yourdomain.com/
N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL=https://n8n.yourdomain.com/

N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY=CHANGE_ME
N8N_SHARED_SECRET=CHANGE_ME

N8N_EVENT_WEBHOOK_URL=http://n8n:5678/webhook/flowpilot-event

FLOWPILOT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://web:3000

RESEND_API_KEY=
EMAIL_FROM=FlowPilot <hello@yourdomain.com>

RAZORPAY_KEY_ID=
RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET=
RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET=CHANGE_ME

SENTRY_DSN=
LOG_LEVEL=info
